name: ConversionApi
summary: Connection Rest API 3.0 — Conversion endpoints. Auto-generated REST surface; one method per HTTP operation.

methods.name: GetConversionMappingAsync
methods.summary: Gets default conversion mappings for converting the project to a different design code.

params.name: projectId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the opened project in the ConnectionRestApi service (only ECEN design code is supported).

params.name: countryCode
params.doc: The requested design code for the converted project.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: ChangeCodeAsync
methods.summary: Changes the design code of the project.

params.name: projectId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the opened project in the ConnectionRestApi service (only ECEN projects are supported).

params.name: conConversionSettings
params.doc: Conversion table for materials in the project (pairs 'ECEN MATERIAL' to 'TARGET DESIGN CODE MATERIAL').

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.
